headline: Green Hills Software Creates Complete Production-Focused Software Environment for Texas Instruments TDA5 Virtual Development Kit
summary: NUREMBERG, Germany, March 10, 2026--embedded world, Hall 4, Stand 325 — Green Hills Software, the worldwide leader in embedded safety and security solutions, today announced the availability of the most comprehensive production-focused software development environment for the new TDA5 SoC family from Texas Instruments running on its virtual development platform. Working closely with TI and Synopsys to assure an optimized integration, the Green Hills SDK (Software Development Kit) features safety

Working closely with TI and Synopsys to assure an optimized integration, the Green Hills SDK (Software Development Kit) features safety
